welcome.zh: 嗨！我是胖虎导游，跟我一起认识真实的动物朋友吧！认识它们之后，就能领养一只专属的卡通小伙伴哦。
welcome.en: Hi! I'm Guide Tiger. Come meet some real animal friends with me! Once you get to know them, you can adopt your very own cartoon buddy.

habitat.zh: 中国南方的森林和山地
habitat.en: Forests and mountains of southern China

diet.en: Carnivore: wild boar, deer and more

protection.zh: 极危（CR）· 国家一级保护动物
protection.en: Critically Endangered (CR) · First-class protected in China

funFacts.zh: 每只老虎的条纹都不一样，就像人类的指纹！
funFacts.en: Every tiger's stripes are unique, just like human fingerprints!

funFacts.zh: 老虎很会游泳，天热的时候喜欢泡在水里。
funFacts.en: Tigers are great swimmers and love soaking in water on hot days.

funFacts.zh: 老虎的吼声可以传到3公里以外。
funFacts.en: A tiger's roar can be heard up to 3 km away.

kid.zh: 大老虎穿着橙色带黑条纹的外衣，走路静悄悄。它是森林里的大王，最喜欢吃肉肉，还会游泳哦！
kid.en: The big tiger wears an orange coat with black stripes and walks very quietly. It is the king of the forest, loves eating meat, and can even swim!

junior.zh: 华南虎是中国特有的老虎亚种，曾经生活在华南的山林里。它们是独居的顶级捕食者，靠条纹在草丛中隐身。由于栖息地减少，华南虎已极度濒危，需要我们一起保护。
junior.en: The South China Tiger is a tiger subspecies unique to China, once roaming the forests of southern China. They are solitary apex predators that use their stripes as camouflage. Habitat loss has made them critically endangered, and they need our protection.

q.zh: 老虎身上的条纹有什么用？
q.en: What are a tiger's stripes for?
What is the South China Tiger's protection status?

guideTask.zh: 去看看真正的老虎，数一数它身上有几种颜色，再回来回答我的问题！
guideTask.en: Go watch the real tiger, count how many colors you can see on it, then come back and answer my questions!

habitat.zh: 中国西南部的高山竹林
habitat.en: Mountain bamboo forests of southwest China

protection.zh: 易危（VU）· 国家一级保护动物

funFacts.zh: 熊猫每天要花10-16个小时吃竹子！
funFacts.en: Pandas spend 10-16 hours a day eating bamboo!

funFacts.zh: 刚出生的熊猫宝宝只有一根香蕉那么大。
funFacts.en: A newborn panda cub is only about the size of a banana.

funFacts.zh: 熊猫有"第六根手指"，方便抓竹子。
funFacts.en: Pandas have a 'sixth finger' that helps them grip bamboo.

kid.zh: 黑白色的胖熊猫最爱抱着竹子啃呀啃。它的黑眼圈圆圆的，走起路来摇摇摆摆，超级可爱！
kid.en: The chubby black-and-white panda loves hugging bamboo and munching away. With round dark eye patches and a waddling walk, it is super cute!

junior.zh: 大熊猫是中国的国宝，生活在海拔较高的竹林里。虽然属于熊科，它们几乎只吃竹子，腕骨进化出伪拇指帮助抓握。通过保护区建设，大熊猫的数量正在慢慢恢复。
junior.en: The Giant Panda is China's national treasure, living in high-altitude bamboo forests. Though part of the bear family, they eat almost only bamboo, using a special 'pseudo-thumb' to grip stalks. Thanks to nature reserves, panda numbers are slowly recovering.

q.en: What do pandas love to eat most?

q.zh: 刚出生的熊猫宝宝有多大？
q.en: How big is a newborn panda cub?

q.zh: 大熊猫每天吃竹子要花多久？
q.en: How long do pandas spend eating each day?

guideTask.zh: 观察熊猫吃竹子的样子，看看它是怎么用爪子抓住竹子的！
guideTask.en: Watch how the panda eats bamboo — see how it grips the stalk with its paws!

habitat.zh: 喜马拉雅山区和中国西南的温带森林
habitat.en: Temperate forests of the Himalayas and southwest China

diet.zh: 主要吃竹叶，也吃水果和昆虫
diet.en: Mostly bamboo leaves, plus fruit and insects

size.zh: 和家猫差不多大，尾巴几乎和身体一样长
size.en: About the size of a house cat, with a tail almost as long as its body

protection.zh: 濒危（EN）· 国家二级保护动物

funFacts.zh: 小熊猫不是熊猫，它有自己独立的科——小熊猫科！
funFacts.en: Red pandas aren't pandas — they have their own family, Ailuridae!

funFacts.zh: 毛茸茸的大尾巴冬天可以当围巾保暖。
funFacts.en: Their fluffy tail doubles as a warm scarf in winter.

funFacts.zh: 小熊猫爬树下树都是头朝下的高手。
funFacts.en: Red pandas are experts at climbing down trees head-first.

kid.zh: 红棕色的小熊猫有一条蓬蓬的大尾巴，脸圆圆的像小狐狸。它喜欢趴在树枝上睡觉，可爱极啦！
kid.en: The reddish-brown red panda has a big fluffy tail and a round face like a little fox. It loves napping on tree branches — adorable!

junior.zh: 小熊猫生活在凉爽的高山森林里，是出色的攀爬者。虽然名字里有"熊猫"，它和大熊猫只是远亲，却同样爱吃竹子。野外的小熊猫因为森林减少而濒危。
junior.en: Red pandas live in cool mountain forests and are excellent climbers. Despite the name, they are only distant relatives of giant pandas, though both love bamboo. Wild red pandas are endangered due to shrinking forests.

q.zh: 小熊猫和大熊猫是同一家族吗？
q.en: Are red pandas in the same family as giant pandas?

q.zh: 小熊猫的大尾巴冬天有什么用？
q.en: What is the red panda's big tail for in winter?
What's special about how red pandas climb down trees?

guideTask.zh: 找找小熊猫在哪根树枝上打盹，看看它的尾巴有几圈花纹！
guideTask.en: Find which branch the red panda is napping on, and count the rings on its tail!

diet.zh: 草食性：最爱金合欢树叶

size.zh: 身高可达5.5米，是世界上最高的动物
size.en: Up to 5.5 m tall — the tallest animal in the world

funFacts.zh: 长颈鹿的脖子那么长，却和人一样只有7块颈椎！
funFacts.en: Despite the long neck, giraffes have just 7 neck bones — same as humans!

funFacts.zh: 长颈鹿的舌头是蓝紫色的，长达50厘米。
funFacts.en: A giraffe's tongue is blue-purple and up to 50 cm long.

funFacts.zh: 长颈鹿站着睡觉，每天只睡很短的时间。
funFacts.en: Giraffes sleep standing up, and only for short periods each day.

kid.zh: 长颈鹿是世界上最高的动物，脖子长长的，可以吃到大树顶上的叶子。它身上的花纹像拼图一样漂亮！
kid.en: The giraffe is the tallest animal in the world. With its long, long neck it can reach leaves at the very top of trees. Its patches look like a beautiful puzzle!

junior.zh: 长颈鹿生活在非洲草原，靠长脖子取食高处的树叶，避免和其他食草动物竞争。每只长颈鹿的斑纹都是独一无二的。它们的心脏特别强壮，才能把血液送到高高的脑袋。
junior.en: Giraffes live on African savannas, using their long necks to reach high leaves and avoid competing with other herbivores. Each giraffe's patch pattern is unique. Their hearts are extra strong to pump blood all the way up to their heads.

q.en: How many neck bones does a giraffe have?

q.zh: 长颈鹿的舌头是什么颜色？
q.en: What color is a giraffe's tongue?

guideTask.zh: 仰头看看长颈鹿吃树叶，猜猜它的脖子比你高多少！
guideTask.en: Look up and watch the giraffe eat leaves — guess how much taller its neck is than you!

habitat.zh: 南半球的海洋和海岸，南极最有名
habitat.en: Southern hemisphere oceans and coasts, most famously Antarctica

size.zh: 不同种类从40厘米到1.2米不等
size.en: From 40 cm to 1.2 m depending on species

protection.en: Several species are Vulnerable or Endangered

funFacts.zh: 企鹅不会飞，但在水里游得飞快，像鱼雷一样！
funFacts.en: Penguins can't fly, but they swim super fast — like torpedoes!

funFacts.zh: 企鹅爸爸会把蛋放在脚背上孵化。
funFacts.en: Penguin dads keep the egg warm on top of their feet.

funFacts.zh: 企鹅的黑白配色是天然的保护色。
funFacts.en: Their black-and-white coloring is natural camouflage in the water.

kid.zh: 企鹅穿着黑白"小礼服"，走路一摇一摆。它不会飞，但是游泳健将，最爱吃小鱼啦！
kid.en: Penguins wear little black-and-white 'tuxedos' and waddle when they walk. They can't fly, but they are champion swimmers who love eating fish!

junior.zh: 企鹅是不会飞的海鸟，翅膀进化成了鳍状肢，让它们在水中灵活穿梭。背黑腹白的颜色让天敌从上面和下面都难以发现它们。很多企鹅生活在寒冷地区，靠厚厚的脂肪和羽毛保暖。
junior.en: Penguins are flightless seabirds whose wings evolved into flippers for agile swimming. Their dark backs and white bellies hide them from predators above and below. Many live in cold regions, kept warm by thick fat and feathers.

options.en: No, but they swim very well

q.en: How do penguin dads incubate the egg?

q.zh: 企鹅的黑白颜色有什么用？
q.en: What is the penguin's black-and-white coloring for?

guideTask.zh: 看看企鹅游泳和走路有什么不一样，学一学它走路的样子！
guideTask.en: Watch how differently penguins swim and walk — try imitating their waddle!
